deferred.reason: Underwriting-domain policies (no appetite decision communicated to a broker before the human determination; declination notes must carry specific risk-based reasons; no E&S referral without the documented admitted-market declination; unfair-discrimination pattern watch on declines) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final intake determinations exclusively to human analysts with the Underwriting Operations Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Submission Clearance Checker, Appetite Fit Scorer, Completeness Chaser, Renewal-Defense Deadline Sentinel) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (agency-management and broker-portal systems: Applied Epic, Vertafore AMS360; submission-intake email/ACORD extraction feeds; clearance systems; loss-run retrieval services; D&B/experian-style firmographic enrichment; cat-modeling exposure feeds) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (record the clearance block/release in the clearance system, send the declination letter with documented reasons, issue the broker information request, open the underwriting file in the policy admin system, notify the surplus-lines broker on referral) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous declination, referral, or broker communication, ever.

Golden eval sets (clearance-conflict detection, appetite-fit calls, completeness gap identification, deadline-risk ranking) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Insured, Account, Submission, Broker, Brokerage, AppetiteStatement, LossRun, StatementOfValues, Application, ClearanceRecord, NeededByClock, DeclinationLetter) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the underwriting_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (submission_triage, clearance_conflict_review, appetite_referral, completeness_chase, renewal_defense) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (appetite_fit_confidence, submission_priority_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest account-book anomaly + xgboost triage-outcome scorer) with NAIC AI-bulletin model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Submission", "Clearance", "Needed-by date", "Renewal defense", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
